meta.question: In which language are the models of this organization written? (Organization ID: 2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa)
meta.finalAnswer:
The models of the organization with ID 2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa (Org18) are written in **German**.

This is evident from the model names found in the dataset, which include German terms such as:
- "Klausuraufgabe" (exam task)
- "Blatt G - Aufgabe 2b" (Sheet G - Task 2b)
- "Übungsblatt G - Aufgabe 2" (Exercise sheet G - Task 2)
- "Choreographiediagramm" (choreography diagram)
- "Neuer Prozess" (new process)
- "Hochschulbewerbung" (university application)
- "Prüfung" (exam)

The organization contains 15 BPMN models, all with German-language names.
